description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named clang that runs on push to master and remove-autoconf branches and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: build and tidy. The build job uses a matrix strategy with multiple environments, runs on ubuntu-20.04, checks out the code, installs dependencies, prepares the CI environment, and runs tests with clang. The tidy job runs on ubuntu-20.04, checks out the code, installs dependencies, prepares the CI environment, runs tests, and performs clang-tidy checks.
